Name: Oversubscribed single beacon
Description: Two synthetic beacons, each MaxConcurrent=1, advertising distinct capabilities.  Workload mixes both capabilities so head-of-line blocking on the global FIFO queue *can't* happen across beacons (each capability has its own dedicated worker).  If NoCrossCapabilityHeadOfLineBlocking fails here it indicates the scheduler is parking work for capability A behind capability B's items rather than dispatching to the idle B beacon -- the smoking-gun signal that cross-capability scheduling rules are needed.
